intro: Darkness doesn’t arrive suddenly — it builds slowly.
description:
Join the all-night investigation at an abandoned building where reports of paranormal activity have never stopped. As a member of a ghost-hunting team, explore empty rooms and dark corridors while monitoring supernatural phenomena.
Use professional detection equipment to track strange fluctuations, record unexplained sounds, and document sightings. As the night progresses, activity intensifies and the building’s hidden past begins to surface.

Key Features:
	•	Explore a large abandoned location filled with dark rooms and hidden areas
	•	Use ghost-hunting gadgets to detect and record paranormal activity
	•	Investigate dynamic supernatural events that escalate throughout the night
	•	Find clues and environmental details that reveal the building’s history
	•	Solve puzzles and uncover the mystery behind the haunting
	•	Immersive atmosphere focused on tension and suspense


The night is long, and the building is never truly silent. Every sound could be a sign, every shadow a warning. Stay focused, trust your equipment, and uncover the truth before it’s too late.
Will you leave with evidence… or become part of the legend?
